# Generated by apps/mods/stellaris/3x-bigger-worlds/scripts/build.py
# Multiplier: x3
# Transformations:
#   district_*_max_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   district_*_min_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   planet_max_districts_add  = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   produces = { res = N }    ->  res = N * 3  (positive numeric only)
# Untouched:
#   Negative values (blocker penalties stay at vanilla magnitude).
#   `@VAR` references (handled in scripted_variables/zz_bworlds_*).
#   `upkeep = { ... }` blocks (net deposit output therefore skews
#   3x-favorable on deposits with upkeep; see README).

d_radioactive_ruins = {
	icon = d_ruins_small
	time = 120

	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_blockers

	potential = { always = no }

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_max_districts_add = -1
	}

	on_cleared = {
		owner = {
			add_monthly_resource_mult = {
				resource = society_research
				value = @tier1researchreward
				min = @tier1researchmin
				max = @tier1researchmax
			}
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers
		cost = {
			energy = 300
		}
	}
}

######################
# Planetary Features #
######################

d_treasure_planet = {
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_rare

	icon = d_treasure_planet

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_origin = origin_treasure_hunters
				is_gestalt = no
			}
		}
		job_treasure_gatherer_add = 500
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				has_origin = origin_treasure_hunters
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		job_treasure_gatherer_gestalt_add = 500
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_black_needle_base = {
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_rare

	icon = d_bunker_door

	custom_tooltip = d_abandoned_black_needle_base_naval_cap
	custom_tooltip_short = d_abandoned_black_needle_base_naval_cap_short

	inline_script = {
		script = jobs/soldiers_add
		AMOUNT = @abandoned_black_needle_base_additional_soldier_job
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_rare

	icon = d_bunker_door

	custom_tooltip = d_abandoned_black_needle_base_naval_cap
	custom_tooltip_short = d_abandoned_black_needle_base_naval_cap_short

	inline_script = {
		script = jobs/soldiers_add
		AMOUNT = @abandoned_black_needle_base_additional_soldier_job
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_hive_dwelling = {
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_rare

	icon = d_city_ruins

	resources = {
		category = planet_deposits
		produces = {
			unity = 30
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_jobs_society_research_produces_mult = 0.05
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}
